name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a free new-patient consult! Happy to get you scheduled. Any preferred day/time that works for you? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental — see you soon
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} at Bright Smile Dental. We can't wait to meet you.

Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient visit, zero sales pressure, and plenty of time for any questions about your smile. We'll handle the insurance check on our end so you don't have to worry about it.

Need to reschedule or have something come up? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll make it easy.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
